//: Scene-synced, self-verifying demo. Each scene: `say` (spoken while it plays), `steps` (Playwright actions), and `expect` (the post-condition that proves the action worked — asserted at record time). After rendering, a vision model also checks each frame matches its line. On any failure the driver retries.

scenes.say: Okay, let me show you around real quick. This is the Playwright site.
First thing I'll do is jump into the docs, so I'll click Get started up here.
And now let me scroll down a bit, so you can see how the guide is laid out. Pretty clean, right?
And that's the quick tour. You point, you click, you read — and you're up and running.
